/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -rdynamic CMakeFiles/sweep.dir/src/4_driver/sweep_generated_sweep.cu.o -o sweep  -Wl,-rpath,/soft/libraries/mpi/openmpi/4.1.1/lib: -Wl,-Bstatic -lcudart_static -Wl,-Bdynamic -ldl -Wl,-Bstatic -lrt libsweeper.a -Wl,-Bdynamic /soft/libraries/mpi/openmpi/4.1.1/lib/libmpi.so -Wl,-Bstatic -lcudart_static -Wl,-Bdynamic -ldl -Wl,-Bstatic -lrt -Wl,-Bdynamic /soft/libraries/mpi/openmpi/4.1.1/lib/libmpi.so
